title: 有馬記念の後に・アタシは強い

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin rises above her powerful classic
and senior competitors and triumphs at the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her rivals, the audience, and I—we all cheer for
her as one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her small stature, she leaves the biggest
mark of anyone at the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With an undeniably beaming smile, Narita Taishin
stands atop the winner's circle.
